actionUnits.condition: FireBasedAudioManager (MonoBehaviour id=112451392, GUID=77f9a59041a2de446bf7704b5c31f103) on Stressed_Guy_No sets shouldPlay=true in Awake and plays its attached AudioSource every timeInterval seconds (timeInterval=25). Object has a BoxCollider (id=9191504438935284416), so Trigger interaction is allowed. Waiting >25s will cause Update() to call audioSource.Play() once when lastPlayed >= timeInterval.

Second cycle verification for FireBasedAudioManager periodic playback: after the previous Play(), lastPlayed resets to 0 and will again reach >= timeInterval after ~25s to trigger another AudioSource.Play(). This validates the repeating behavior under shouldPlay=true.
